name: Only Down!
short_description: Have game developers often forced you to climb somewhere with no purpose? This time, your goal is to hit rock bottom and nothing else. It should be simple enough, good luck to everyone.
detailed_description:
Have game developers often forced you to climb somewhere with no purpose? This time, your goal is to hit rock bottom and nothing else. It should be simple enough, good luck to everyone.

  • Ragdoll
  • Flight Control
  • Bullet Time
  • 2 Maps
  • Hard and Fun modes
  • Capybara
  • Checkpoints
  • Descent 50 kilometers
  • Portals
  • Trampolines
  • Texture curves
  • The ability to get stuck in textures
  • Unstuck System
  • The possibility of falling into hell
  • Great low poly graphics straight from the 80s
  • 250+ fps on the microwave
  • Poor physics
  • The main character is a freak
  • Dumb gameplay
  • There is no plot
  • Overall a dumb game
  • Please do not use the green elevator
  • And well, there is a cake at the finale, sorry for the spoiler

*Parody game

Only Down!



Music:
Roy Edwin Williams - Lewis Avenue
Rock Music - Energetic Rock Background
